# Adapters


<!-- WARNING: THIS FILE WAS AUTOGENERATED! DO NOT EDIT! -->

## PluginRegistryAdapter Class

Adapter that wraps a
[`UnifiedPluginRegistry`](https://cj-mills.github.io/cjm-fasthtml-workflow-transcription-single-file/core/registry.html#unifiedpluginregistry)
(from `cjm-fasthtml-plugins`) to implement
[`PluginRegistryProtocol`](https://cj-mills.github.io/cjm-fasthtml-workflow-transcription-single-file/core/protocols.html#pluginregistryprotocol).
This allows the workflow to work with any plugin registry that follows
the unified plugin registry interface.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/cj-mills/cjm-fasthtml-workflow-transcription-single-file/blob/main/cjm_fasthtml_workflow_transcription_single_file/core/adapters.py#L16"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### PluginRegistryAdapter

>  PluginRegistryAdapter (app_registry, category:str='transcription')

*Adapts app’s UnifiedPluginRegistry to workflow’s
PluginRegistryProtocol.*

## DefaultConfigPluginRegistryAdapter Class

Extended adapter that applies default configuration values when loading
plugin configs. This ensures all required fields have values even if not
explicitly configured.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/cj-mills/cjm-fasthtml-workflow-transcription-single-file/blob/main/cjm_fasthtml_workflow_transcription_single_file/core/adapters.py#L89"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

>                                          ription_single_file.core.registry.Uni
>                                          fiedPluginRegistry,
>                                          category:str='transcription')

*Plugin registry adapter that provides default config values for
unconfigured plugins.*
